name: @firegrid/trace
description: Fable-native chDB (embedded ClickHouse) OpenTelemetry span exporter for Firegrid.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Trace.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/trace diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/trace lint is covered by F# compile'
